name: Jennifer Brennan's Curry Powder Blend
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees.
2. Line a baking pan with foil and place the whole spices in separate heaps upon it.
3. Place the pan on the top shelf of the oven until the spices become aromatic and are slightly browned.
4. Do not over-roast them.
5. Place the roasted spices (in several batches) into the spice grinder, blender, or mortar; grind or pound to a fine powder.
6. Sift the ground spices into a storage jar.
7. Add the pre-ground turmeric and fenugreek; cap the jar and stir until the spices are well mixed.
